error_signature: Google Drive trigger not recognizing new files
title: Google Drive trigger fails to recognize newly uploaded files
symptom: The Google Drive node only processes files with timestamps newer than the last polling checkpoint, ignoring older files. Users may see only a single file processed despite multiple uploads.
not_this_if: All files have timestamps newer than the last polling checkpoint
root_cause: n8n's Google Drive trigger uses a polling mechanism that tracks files by their modification timestamps. If files are uploaded with timestamps older than the last checkpoint, they are considered already processed and won't be picked up.
fix_steps: Delete the execution history of the workflow.
Reactivate the workflow to reset the polling checkpoint.
agent_instruction: Reset the polling checkpoint by deactivating and reactivating the workflow after deleting its execution history.
